mapper.sql: id, code, name, dept_type, is_valid, dept_level, super_dept_id, is_accounting, hospital, discipline_code, is_research, creator_no, create_date, operate_time, alias, hr_id, director, is_budg, is_item, is_last, administrator
mapper.select:
SELECT id , name,code FROM ct_srm_dept where is_valid=1
and (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptDto.name}, '%') or code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptDto.name}, '%'))

SELECT csd.id as rowId, csd.code as code , csd.name as name,csd.dept_level, csd.dept_type,csdl.name as dept_level_name,csdt.name as dept_type_name, csd2.name as super_dept_name,csd.is_valid,csd.administrator,csd.is_accounting FROM ct_srm_dept csd left join ct_srm_dept_level csdl on csdl.id=csd.dept_level left join ct_srm_dept_type csdt on csdt.id=csd.dept_type left join ct_srm_dept csd2 on csd2.id=csd.super_dept_id where csd.is_valid=1

select csd.id as rowId, csd.code as code, csd.name as name, csd.is_valid as isValid, csd.is_accounting as isAccounting,csd.is_research as isResearch, csd.hr_id as hrId, csd.is_budg as isBudg, csd.is_item as isItem, csd.is_last as isLast, fdiscipline.code as "disciplineCode.id",fdiscipline.name as "disciplineCode.name", puser.id as "director.id",puser.name as "director.name", csdt.code as "deptType.id",csdt.name as "deptType.name", csdl.code as "deptLevel.id",csdl.name as "deptLevel.name", csd2.id as "superDeptId.id",csd2.name as "superDeptId.name", hoo.code as "hospital.id",hoo.name as "hospital.name", csd.creator_no,csd.create_date,csd.operate_time from ct_srm_dept csd left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code= csd.discipline_code left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=csd.director and puser.dept=csd.id left join ct_srm_dept csd2 on csd2.id=csd.super_dept_id left join ct_srm_dept_level csdl on csdl.code=csd.dept_level left join ct_srm_dept_type csdt on csdt.code=csd.dept_type left join hos_org_organization hoo on hoo.code=csd.hospital where csd.id=#{RowId}
SELECT id , name FROM ct_srm_dept where is_valid=1 and is_research =1
